domain: Sequoia thick-bark fire resistance — 30cm passive bark with air cavities + tannin flame retardant + outer dead-cell layer protects living heartwood.
specific_mechanism: Thick passive insulation + chemical retardancy + redundant outer layers absorb damage before it reaches core.
llm_application: BARK-CHECKPOINT: protect a critical core heartwood parameter checkpoint with a THICK BARK of redundant compressed snapshots — multiple precision-tier (BF16/INT8/INT4) noise-resistant encoded snapshots ringing the heartwood; weight corruption is absorbed by bark layers before it propagates inward.
novelty_claim: Single durable snapshot = standard. Durable safeguards seek robustness via training. Firewalls act on I/O. BARK-CHECKPOINT differs by RINGING heartwood with redundant precision-tier noise-resistant outer snapshots as passive structural defense against weight corruption.
